raw.message: MLB The Show 26 is here! Start your road to The Show with 11 new schools.

hook.summary: Aaron Judge introduces the game's new features with a celebrity endorsement.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of Aaron Judge speaking, followed by fast-paced in-game highlights of hitting and pitching.
hook.text_overlay: MLB THE SHOW 26, EXPANDED AMATEUR EXPERIENCE, COOPERSTOWN HALL OF FAME
hook.voiceover_transcript: MLB The Show 26 has more roads to greatness than ever before,

scene_flow: Aaron Judge introduces the game's expanded features and 'roads to greatness'.
Fast-paced montage of in-game baseball action, including home runs and pitching.
Aaron Judge discusses the variety of ways to play, including Diamond Dynasty.
Humorous behind-the-scenes clip of Aaron Judge at a photoshoot being called 'stiff'.
Final end card with the game logo, 'Available Now', and 'Make Your Mark' slogan.
audience_proxy: Male baseball fans and gamers aged 18-45 who follow MLB and enjoy sports simulations.
